evals.name: cross-cutting-inventory-7-surfaces
evals.prompt: User: 'rename hm-l2-foo to hm-bar across the project'
evals.expected: Step 1: inventory, 7 surfaces scanned, count reported

evals.name: risk-tier-classification
evals.prompt: Change affects 25 files across 4 surfaces. Risk tier?
evals.expected: HIGH RISK (>=20 refs) -> deprecation shim required

assertions.text: Refuses big-bang, splits into atomic commits

evals.name: phase-ordering-matters
evals.expected: Refuse, explain ordering (references -> templates -> skills -> commands -> workflows -> agents)

evals.name: post-phase-validation
evals.prompt: After Phase B (skills), 3 stale refs remain in agents
evals.expected: Detect with check-cross-cutting.sh, fix before Phase C
